headline: 3 tokenized fund contracts discovered on Ethereum and Base; Celo deployment unverified.
short_headline: 3 contracts on Ethereum & Base, Celo unverified

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search and search results surfaced two Anemoy-tagged ERC-20 tokens on Ethereum: JTRSY (0x8c213ee79581ff4984583c6a801e5263418c4b86) and deJAAA (0xaaa0008c8cf3a7dca931adaf04336a5d808c82cc).

Official website (anemoy.io) documents three funds: SPXA (S&P 500 Index), JTRSY (U.S. Treasury), and JAAA (AAA CLO). No centralized deployed-contracts page found; fund pages reference Centrifuge app links.
No audit links recorded in pinned data; audit PDFs not discovered in this run.
No GitHub repository recorded in pinned data; no deployment artifacts found.
SPXA confirmed on Base (0x09b61343097c1f9b159a3ae7151298efd10f0db2) via RWA.xyz and news sources. JTRSY and JAAA confirmed on Ethereum. Celo deployment unconfirmed after search attempts.
No factory pattern detected; each fund is a standalone ERC-20 token contract.
Identified token contracts only; proxy admin, owner, and governance addresses not yet discovered.

rationale.verdict: Discovery identifies 3 confirmed fund token contracts (JTRSY, JAAA on Ethereum; SPXA on Base) from website and block-explorer evidence. Celo deployment status remains unknown; no GitHub, audits, or admin/governance addresses were discoverable in this run. Mixed basis due to off-chain website fetches plus failed on-chain enumeration for Celo.

evidence.shows: Official website listing three funds: SPXA, JTRSY, JAAA with partner information (Janus Henderson, Centrifuge)
JTRSY token contract on Ethereum with 1M+ tokens and 8 holders
deJAAA token contract on Ethereum with 8.8M tokens and 10 holders
SPXA fund details including Base deployment at 0x09b61343097c1f9b159a3ae7151298efd10f0db2, managed by Anemoy Capital and Janus Henderson, with 107K tokens, 2 holders
JTRSY fund page describing U.S. Treasury Fund with features (daily liquidity, direct ownership, transparency, investor protection)
JAAA fund page describing AAA CLO Fund with Janus Henderson and Centrifuge partnerships
SPXA fund page describing S&P 500 Index Fund with Janus Henderson and Centrifuge partnerships, Proof-of-Index infrastructure
Official Centrifuge announcement of SPXA launch on Base with Anemoy Capital as investment manager, Janus Henderson as sub-investment manager, FalconX as anchor investor

unknowns: D1-celo: CeloScan name-tag search for 'Anemoy' returned no results; Celo deployment status unverified
D2-deployments-doc: No dedicated /docs/deployments or /docs/addresses page found; fund pages reference external Centrifuge app links
D3-audits: No audit links recorded in protocol context; no PDF audits discovered
D4-github: No GitHub repository recorded in protocol context
D5-celo-zero: Celo chain returned zero addresses from search attempts; repeat checks recommended
D7-admin-missing: Proxy admin, owner, and governance addresses not yet identified; require on-chain read API calls or Centrifuge app inspection
D8-multichain-gaps: JTRSY and JAAA deployment status on Base and Celo not yet confirmed; only Ethereum evidence found

protocol_metadata.about: Anemoy Capital is a Centrifuge-native asset manager providing institutional-grade investment opportunities tokenized on blockchain. The platform offers three funds: JTRSY (U.S. Treasury bills with daily redemptions), JAAA (AAA-rated CLO tranches), and SPXA (S&P 500 Index Fund). Funds are regulated by the BVI Financial Services Commission and issued as ERC-20 tokens on Ethereum, Base, and other chains, enabling 24/7 trading with transparent onchain holdings.
